steps.title: Translate each cost
steps.content: The loaf of bread costs $3$ dollars. The grapes cost $2.20$ dollars per pound, so $p$ pounds of grapes cost $2.20p$ dollars.

steps.title: Build the total equation
steps.content:
The total cost is the grape cost plus the bread cost.
$$2.20p+3=14.00$$
The answer is A.
